headline: Waste Management Market Aids Republic Services Amid Low Liquidity
summary: RSG taps into rising waste demand and EV adoption to drive growth, but liquidity strain and stiff competition weigh on profitability.

headline: Government support fuels PFAS treatment market, with much more to come
summary: As regulations continue to rise, companies like Clean Harbors and Revive Environmental that offer treatment and disposal of PFAS-contaminated material are seeing major business growth.

raw.headline: Government support fuels PFAS treatment market, with much more to come
raw.summary: As regulations continue to rise, companies like Clean Harbors and Revive Environmental that offer treatment and disposal of PFAS-contaminated material are seeing major business growth.

headline: Baird Maintains Neutral on Republic Services, Lowers Price Target to $240
summary: Baird  analyst David Manthey   maintains Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $242 to $240.

raw.headline: Baird Maintains Neutral on Republic Services, Lowers Price Target to $240
